Samara State Medical University (SamSMU), Russia

Samara State Medical University was established in 1919 and is currently one of Russia oldest and most esteemed medical university.

  • By Altas Mentor
  • University In Russia
  • January 25, 2025
  • Home
  • Russia
  • Samara State Medical University (SamSMU), Russia
# Russia

Samara State Medical University (SamSMU), Russia

Samara State Medical University was established in 1919 and is currently one of Russia oldest and most esteemed medical university. The university is located in Samara city and has eight faculties, more than sixty-five academic departments and other medical research and teaching institutions. It is reputed for groundbreaking education, innovation, and integration of education and practice at all levels of the globe. SamSMU is well equipped for serving the needs of international students because it houses multiple cultures. The institution is especially appealing to prospective physicians due to the cost of tuition, acceptance of the awarded credentials and involvement in vast research activities.

The university incorporates extracurricular activities with learning for a well-rounded student experience. It is equipped with a modern library furnished sports facilities, dining halls, gymnasiums, and even modern hostels. In a bid to Foster a healthy lifestyle, SamSMU organizes different sports events and other recreational activities for the students. Graduates from the university can practice medicine globally, including India, and with the strong emphasis on proper licensing procedures. Samara Stae Medical University’s quality academic foundation with reduced fees and effective student life makes it ideal for pursuing an MBBS degree at the university.

Get Call Back from Atlas Mentor Counsellors

Why Choose Samara State Medical University, Russia?

Selection of the university is very important when pursuing an MBBS degree, and on this criterion, Samara State Medical University performs significantly well in comparison to other universities because of the combination of the quality of education offered, affordability, and their global credibility. This list illustrates why SamSMU is one of the best medical universities for new students.

High-Quality Education

The university focuses on the top-end quality of medical education for its students.

The academic performance is backed with Experienced, highly skilled faculty and the use of learning technology, plus high-quality instructional tools and laboratories.

Affordable Tuition Fees

Compared to other medical universities in Europe and North America, SamSMU charges lower medical school tuition.

These students will also benefit from cheap hostel accommodation and daily expenditure, making it affordable for international students.

Global Recognition

All medical degrees obtained from Samara State Medical University are accepted by the WHO and other medical boards, hence enables graduates to work in any country without restriction.

Research and Innovation Opportunities

Students can engage in basic and applied medical science research that is relevant to the world.

The university is ready to provide opportunities for students’ initiatives and regularly holds scientific meetings.

Diverse Student Community

SamSMU accommodates students from different nations in the world, creating a multi-national and friendly environment.

Learners encounter distinct cultures and ideas.

Excellent Facilities 

The campus has modern equipped classrooms, laboratories, a large library, sports and recreational facilities.

Students are offered comfortable, fully furnished, and well maintained hostel facilities.

Vigorous and Engaged Student Life

The university encourages a healthy balance of life by engaging students in sporting activities and organizing outdoor events and having available gym facilities.

Students may take up several sports activities and take part in various tournaments and cultural activities.

No Entrance Tests for Intake

Indian students have no further entrance tests as they only have to qualify with the NEET exam.

Favorable Atmosphere for International Students

The university is keen on creating a good conducive environment for academic, personal, and cultural integration.

Nutritious and cost effective meals are served through the nutrition centers.

Employment Prospects

Pass out students are equipped with the requisite skills needed for a career in medicine throughout the globe and are able to work in their countrysafter passing the necessary licensing examinations.

There are also chances of greater known as further specialization and higher studies.

Students of Samara State Medical University receive high quality education, international exposure, and active campus life at a reasonable fee, making it a great place for getting an MBBS degree.

This cost-effective fee structure, combined with high-quality education and excellent facilities, makes Samara State Medical University a great option for medical aspirants.

Eligibility Criteria of Samara State Medical University, Russia

The following criteria must be fulfilled for students to gain admission at Samara State Medical University for the MBBS program:

Eligibility for NEET

Indian applicants must clear the NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test) as part of the admission requirements.

Age Restrictions

The applicant should turn 17 years by 31st December of the year of seeking admission.

There is an upper age limit of 25 years as on 31st December of the admission year.

Educational Qualifications

Applicants must have completed Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (PCB) as core subjects in their High School or 12th Standard.

Minimum aggregate marks

General category students should not be below 50%.

Reserved category students should not be below 40%.

Citizenship Certificate

Applicants must submit a citizenship certificate at the time of admission.

These simple guidelines with no extra entrance tests apart from NEET otherwise makes it easier for Indian students to achieve their MBBS dreams at Samara State Medical University.

Hostel Facilities at Samara State Medical University, Russia

Samara State Medical University has invested adequate resources into hostel facilities to create a comfortable and safe environment for international students. Here are the highlights of the hostel accommodations:

Well Furnished Rooms

Hostel rooms like beds, closets, and tables study tables and chairs, and are thus adequately furnished.

Rooms are also maintained regularly, and spacious to provide comfort and convenience.

Modern Amenities

Hostels come equipped with a range of amenities including:

reading rooms and quiet spaces designated for studying.

Well maintained dining areas exemplary for a range of meals.

gym and fitness centers for physical well being.

swimming pool and swimming facilities for relaxation.

canteen facilities that serve hygienic food cheaply.

ATM for on-campus banking.

Affordable Fees

The hostel fee of 35,000 RUB is extremely economical, and thus students from all backgrounds can afford hostel accommodation, which is budget friendly.

Safe and Secure Environment

CCTV cameras and security personnel onsite help provide a safe living environment.

Strict safety protocols are maintained to provide security.

Cultural and Social Experience

Students learn from one another and foster friendships, as students from different countries are housed in the hostel.

Convenient Location

The hostels are close to academic buildings, which relieves students of the burden of walking long distances to classes and university facilities.

At Samara State Medical University, the hostel accommodations offer a homely ambiance that improves the student’s experience thanks to its modern facilities, affordability, and safety.

Student Life at Samara State Medical University, Russia

Samara State Medical University’s students are well-rounded thanks to their undivided attention to academics, personal pursuits, and other essential activities. Here’s how SamSMU innovatively provides an intriguing environment for its students:

Community Diversity

The presence of international students alongside host country citizens provides for an enriched learning environment with distinct cultures and customs.

Co-curricular Involvement

The institution remains active with its students by inviting them to partake in other activities outside academics through sports, festivals, and other cultural functions.

Health and Sports

SamSMU is always on the forefront of sporting activities and health, as there is a modern sports center, gym, swimming pool, and sports fields to promote outdoors activities to students.

Students may opt to take part in sports such as volleyball, basketball, football, fencing, table tennis, karate, or aerobics.

To promote a culture of teamwork and collaboration, sporting activities are held throughout the school year during different competitive weeks.

Festivity And Events

Students from different science disciplines and other areas of study get to participate in regular cultural activities, competitions and events to show their skills.

Contemporary Amenities

Students have access to a campus library so that they may study and undertake research for their courses and holds them in rest areas, which are equipped with other amenities like auditoriums and dining halls.

Reasonable Living Standards

Students are less stressed as they are provided cheaper accommodation in the form of hostels, and also affordable food services.

Safe and Supportive Environment 

The international students’ transition and adaptation is simpler, as the institution offers a safe and nurturing environment.

The institution encourages students towards their academic and professional advancement through active involvement in scientific research work, internship training and attendance of seminars.

At Samara State Medical University, students get world-class education and active and diverse student life which helps them develop skills for their future outstanding accomplishments.

Ranking at Samara State Medical University, Russia

Samara’s State Medical University is known for its educational and research activities at a national and international level. Here are the rankings:

Country Rank: 190

World Rank: 5366

The indicators of academic achievement, contribution to research, and the respect given to the school by other medical institutions are well captured by these rankings. While it is true that SamSMU does not rank in the top positions, the lack of international recognition is compensated by affordability and high-quality education which makes it an attractive proposition for aspiring medical professionals.

Advantages of Studying at Samara State Medical University, Russia

The Samara State Medical University is a great choice for students from different countries because of its economical fee structure, high-quality education, and a multicultural environment, all of which serve to motivate students to excel in the medical field at an international level.

High-Quality Education

Students enrolled in Samara State Medical University are rest assured that they will get world class education for medicine as the university is teacher by the best in the field and has a well planned syllabus.

Affordable Tuition Fees

International students looking for superb quality education at an economical price will find the Samara State Medical University as a perfect match as its fee structure is quite reasonable while maintaining high standards of education.

International Recognition

The graduates of the university earning a medical degree from this institution are abe to avail employment opportunities in multiple different nations because the medical license is valid in many countries.

Diverse Student Body

Apart from students from the region of Samara, the university has students from different parts of the globe which improves the quality of education as well as the cross cultural interaction of the world.

Strong Research Focus

Students willing to participate in advanced medical projects and researches will appreciate Samara State Medical University’s deep focus in science and medicine for seeking development on an international scale.

State-of-the-Art Facilities

The university has advanced facilities such as smart equipped classrooms, modern laboratories, a large stash of books in the library, sports facilities, and student hostels providing essential items needed for a nurturing and efficient student environment.

Assistance for Foreign Students

International students can take advantage of an array of services offered by the University, such as accommodation, orientation, and academic support.

Cultural and Extracurricular Activities

Students are free to participate in sports and other forms of cultural and student activities which enhance their life at the University.

Global Exposure

Attending Samara State Medical University enables students to have contacts abroad, which facilitates their professional and personal development.

Post-Graduation Opportunities

Graduates are encouraged to continue their education. Students of the University, particularly those with medical degrees, are in great demand in the labor market in Russia and abroad.

Samara State is one of the top medical universities in Russia due to these services and the state of the art facilities contained within the campus.

Placement at Samara State Medical University, Russia

Samara State Medical College also gives great prospects for students by aiding them straight into the medical field both inside Russia and abroad and here is what the university gives as a placement guarantee:

Job Placement

Samara State Medical University has its own trained graduates. They are employable in the medical field and can work in the university’s affiliated hospitals and clinics or other health institutions.

Studies Advancement

The university also motivates students by providing an avenue for further specialization or offering other postgraduate programs to make sure students get the necessary skills and qualifications.

Master’s Degree Recognition

The medical degree awarded by Samara State Medical College is conferred without restrictions. Graduates are able to practice medicine in several countries such as India or Russia, among others, thus furthering their career options internationally.

Practicum and Work Experience

The university provides them with clinical practice that makes the students employable and equips them with practical skills that places them in a position where they are ready to work as soon as they complete their studies.

Employment Assistance

The university assists with professional placement by organizing meetings or seminars with students and prospective employers interested in location graduates in the medical sector.

As a whole, Samara State Medical University prepares its students with the relevant skills, qualifications, and international experience necessary to thrive in a competitive medical job market.

Education Loan for Indian Students

Here is all the relevant information you need regarding Indian students who want to get an education loan to cover their studies at Samara State Medical University, one of the many institutions that accept international students.

Eligibility Criteria

Provided that the applicant can furnish evidence of having been accepted into the MBBS programme at Samara State Medical University, they will need to qualify for citizenship in India.

As with any loan, a considerable academic track record is usually needed, along with a NEET score, the admission receipt from the university, and a statement demonstrating financial hardship.

Loan Limits

An education loan may accommodate payment for the pupil’s tuition fee, cost of a place to stay, traveling expenses, and additional fees that may arise. The loan amount is usually determined by the borrower’s total cost of education.

Certain financial institutions make loans available for up to twenty lakh rupees to students looking to study abroad. Exceptional situations may warrant the approval of greater sums.

Rates of Interest

Interest rates differ by financial institution starting from 9 percent to 14 percent per year. Students with good performance on particular examinations or poor socioeconomic standing may be granted favorable terms by selected financial institutions.

Necessary Items

Samara State Medical University Admission Letter

NEET Scorecard

Identity Proof (Aadhaar, Passport, etc.)

Proof of Parent’s Income (Income Tax Return, Paystub, etc.)

Collateral papers (if applicable, dependent on the loan amount).

Repayment Duration

Usually, banks set the repayment ranges from 5 to 15 years after studies have been pursued. The start of the repayment period is determined by the loan conditions alongside completing the course or a grace period.

Co-Signer Requirement

Education loans often come attached with the necessity for an additional signer, typically a parent or guardian is because of their ability to repay the loan on behalf of a student.

Loan’s Implementation

Required documents, bank forms and going through verification are part and parcel of the application process. To avoid unnecessary issues in obtaining the funds, applying for a loan should be done at the earliest opportunity.

Numerous educational consultancy businesses offer help with the loan procedure and with filling out the necessary documents. One such furthering agency that can assist students seeking an education loan for Samara State Medical University is Bright Future Abroad Studies.

FAQs on Samara State Medical University

Samara State Medical University is a notable institution in Russia due to the high quality of medical training, the multicultural nature of the student population, and the emphasis on research which is excellent for those students looking to study medicine.

What is the ranking of Samara State Medical University in the country?

According to UniRank, Samara State Medical University is ranked number 190 in Russia and number 5366 in the world. The university may not be one of its top ranks, but it is still commendable for its offered programs.

 

Is Samara State Medical University good for studying MBBS?

Yes, Samara State Medical University is one of the best options when it comes to studying MBBS. The university has affordable fees, an international student body, and a medical school that grants recognized degrees.

How can I get admission to Samara State Medical University?

Those wanting to study there have to meet the admission requirements, which simply include getting the NEET for Indian students. No entrance exams are given by the university. Students just have to satisfy the minimum educational standards, provide identification documents like the NEET qualification and nationality documents.

Is NEET a prerequisite for pursuit of MBBS at Samara State Medical University?

Indian students are required to qualify in the NEET exam for admission to the MBBS Program at Mamara State Medical University. This is a common prerequisite for all Indians.

How many students from India are studying in Samara State Medical University?

The figures of Indian Students are substantial but specific numbers regarding enrolments tend to change year over year. Indian medical students prefer this university, because it offers inexpensive yet quality education.

What is the estimated cost of living in Russia?

The samara region of Russia is not as expensive to live in as some of the other european countries. Students’ estimated monthly living expenses such as meals, housing costs, travel, and entertainment range from 20,000 to 30,000 RUB.

Can I practice medicine in India after completing MBBS from Samara State Medical University?

Yes, after receiving an MBBS from Samara State University, the student is able to apply for the Medical Council of India Screening Test (MCI) where they will be issued an MC license if they pass.

What are the job prospects after completing MBBS from Samara State Medical University?

Upon completing an MBBS From Samara State University, graduates are eligible to work as medical doctors in hospitals, clinics and other healthcare facilities across India, Russia and numerous other countries. Alongside the medical degree, the university also offers postgraduate and research studies in various fields of Medicine.

Are there any scholarships available for international students?

Yes, there are certain scholarships available for international students and they range from need based and merit based scholarships. Numerous students who have been offered a government-funded scholarship often report better academic performance to be one of the prerequisites. For further details, students are advised to consult the university directly or speak to an education consultant.

How is the climate in Samara? 

Samantha has a distinct weather pattern which is defined by long winters, where the temperatures can drop well below freezing from November to February. Students from warmer climates may take some time in adjusting to the weather. These FAQs provide a helpful understanding for prospective students considering Samara State Medical University to pursue their medical studies.
